case_title: RATLOAF VS DORRESTEYN, DEREK OWNER &INDIV. MOSS MACHINE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY RATLOAF AS TO DEFENDANT DORRESTEYN, DEREK  OWNER &INDIV. MOSS MACHINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DORRESTEYN, DEREK  OWNER &INDIV. MOSS MACHINE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,063.96 FILED BY DORRESTEYN, DEREK  OWNER &INDIV. MOSS MACHINE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RATLOAF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF RATLOAF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RATLOAF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DORRESTEYN, DEREK  OWNER &INDIV. MOSS MACHINE $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DORRESTEYN, DEREK  OWNER &INDIV. MOSS MACHINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT RATLOAF PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DORRESTEYN, DEREK  OWNER &INDIV. MOSS MACHINE
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT: MAILED OUT INFO RE: REQUIRED FEE FOR A CERTFD.COPY OF SATISFACTION;
